title: Verify Cancellation Flow Rejection and Final Exit
description: Tests the path where a user rejects all retention efforts (reminder and discount) and successfully cancels the trial.
preconditions: The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' Hub and click 'Cancel Trial'.
2. In the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. In the 'First Month Discount' offer pop-up, click the secondary action to cancel (e.g., 'Cancel Anyway').

expected_result: The trial is immediately cancelled. The homepage widget updates to the 'cancelled trial' state. All premium content becomes locked. The 'feedback-popup-viewed' event is triggered.
